includes.expression: Window.IsActive(musicinformation) | Window.IsActive(songinformation) | Window.IsActive(movieinformation) | Window.IsActive(addoninformation) | Window.IsActive(pvrguideinfo) | Window.IsActive(pvrrecordinginfo) | Window.IsActive(pictureinfo) | Window.IsVisible(script-script.extendedinfo-DialogVideoInfo.xml) | Window.IsVisible(script-script.extendedinfo-DialogInfo.xml) | Window.IsVisible(script-script.extendedinfo-VideoList.xml)

param.name: visible
param.value: String.Contains(Listitem.Genre,ciencia ficción)| String.Contains(Listitem.Genre,science-fiction)| String.Contains(Listitem.Genre,science fiction)| String.Contains(Listitem.Genre,ciencia ficcion)| String.Contains(Listitem.Genre,sci-fi)| String.Contains(Listitem.Genre,scifi)| String.Contains(Listitem.Genre,sci fi)

control.description: button overlay to avoid closing in dialog area
